loop1.note: Showing monthly active, reactive, and total energy consumption; energy target and subsidy limits are not configured for this asset.

loop1.note: Showing total active/reactive power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset.

loop1.note: Showing total active power and import-based loss proxy — per-phase energy and dedicated export energy aren't measured for this asset to calculate a true input-output delta.

loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — anomaly events, expected load, and expected range are not measured by this asset.
